creator: croyle@gelemna.ft-wayne.in.us
text:
Please close this, I updated my port-in-progress of txt2html-1.24 while
half asleep, and failed to notice a couple of things (like the fact that
it's broken with perl4 and the need to include the license file in the
package).  I've emailed the author about the brokenness and depending on
what I hear from him will submit either a port for the next version or
one that uses perl5.
-- 
I've always wanted to be a dilettante, but I've never quite been ready
to make the commitment.
